text.title: Lessons Learned Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the org have a lesson repository with retrieval triggers?

conclusion.verdict: Stand up repository before capturing lessons

branch.when: repository_present == true AND retrieval_enforced == true AND categories_defined == false
repository_present == true AND retrieval_enforced == true AND categories_defined == true

example.trace: repository_present=true → retrieval_enforced=true → categories_defined=true → new lesson tagged + retrievable.
